description_long: This house features a compact, single-story structure with a prominent gable roof covered in dark gray shingles. The front facade is defined by a central modern door with a vertical glass panel, flanked by two large rectangular windows and topped with a triangular transom window. The lower portion of the exterior walls is clad in red brick, while the upper section is finished with light-colored wood paneling. The side views reveal additional windows and the continuation of the brick and wood materials, with the roof overhanging slightly for added protection. The rear of the house mirrors the front in window arrangement but lacks a door, maintaining the symmetrical design. The overall appearance is clean and modern, with a blend of traditional and contemporary architectural elements.
description: A compact, single-story house with a gable roof, modern central door, large windows, and a mix of brick and wood exterior finishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, two large side windows, a triangular transom window, and a mix of brick and wood cladding.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the overhanging gable roof, two large windows, and the brick base with wood paneling above.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a similar window arrangement as the front but without a door, and the same brick and wood materials.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the other side, with two large windows and the overhanging roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large rectangular windows and a triangular transom
attribute_entryway_design: Central modern door with vertical glass panel, flanked by large windows, topped with a transom, and sheltered by a gable roof overhang
